title: Orcs VS Apes doubles attack damage to Humanoid targets

card.rawText: All creatures inflict 2x Atk damage to Humanoid-type creatures on the field.

effect.value: All creatures inflict 2x Atk damage to Humanoid-type creatures on the field.

plan.title: Orcs VS Apes doubles attack damage to Humanoid targets
plan.summary: With Orcs VS Apes active as field magic, a creature attacking a Humanoid-type target deals 2x attack damage.

notes: Pre-place Orcs VS Apes in an active field magic slot.
Use Test Orc Scout as player_2 primary Humanoid-type target.
Ensure not in first turn cycle.

steps: Player 1 attacks Test Orc Scout while Orcs VS Apes is field-active.
Inspect damage event multiplier and defender HP loss.

expectedAssertions.label: Humanoid target took doubled attack damage

manualVerification: Confirm non-Humanoid targets are not doubled in a separate variant.
riskNotes: This covers the multiplier effect 031-E02; 031-E01 is a duplicate damage parse of the same printed line.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Orcs VS Apes' Humanoid damage multiplier aura.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
